_comment: Single source of truth for the gateway. Edit this, then run scripts/apply-config.sh (or redeploy). NOTE: this currently reflects the lab3 single-box test, where lab3 runs BOTH the gateway AND a local seafront on :8000 — so the dashboard uses 8080 and squid1 points at the local seafront. On a DEDICATED gateway PC, set dashboard_port back to 8000 and point each microscope at its real backbone IP (e.g. 192.168.50.11).
